# STARTER_COMPONENT_SPEC

Use this starter for **Component Specification**.

## Load order
- `dist/DEPLOY_LITE.md`
- `dist/lite_routes/rt_component_spec.md`
- `dist/lite_contracts/component_spec.md`
- `src/runtime/cards/skills/component-systems-expert.md`
- `src/runtime/cards/skills/front-end-handoff-expert.md`
- optional: `src/runtime/cards/skills/accessibility-feedback-expert.md`
- optional: `src/runtime/cards/skills/color-system-expert.md`
- `dist/SESSION_ZERO.md`

## Best for
- Use when a reusable system component needs state-safe documentation.

## Estimated footprint
- Approximate startup size with governing skills: ~1533 words / ~2039 tokens

## Escalate instead to
- `dist/DEPLOY_UI.md` when the task widens inside one domain
- `dist/DESIGNPILOT_DEPLOY.md` when multiple domains or proof-sensitive conflicts are central

## Suggested kickoff prompt
I am starting a lightweight DesignPilot session for Component Specification. Use the loaded lite bootstrap, this route, and this contract. Ask only for the missing context that would materially change routing or output quality.
